copy.title: Catch and Read — Left Wing
copy.prompt: The ball is coming to the other side. Read the closeout.
copy.game_context: 4-on-4 half-court shell. Ball reverses from the slot to the left wing. Your defender was helping in the paint and has to close out to you.
copy.possession_setup: You are the left wing. Your defender (x2) was helping one pass away in the paint. As the pass arrives he sprints out at you, still a step or two short of his cushion.
copy.decision_moment: The ball arrives at your hands. x2 is closing hard but is still short and decelerating.
copy.visible_cue: x2 is closing fast but has not closed the cushion. Hands are not up. Clean catch, clear sightline.
copy.best_read: Catch in the shooting pocket and rise immediately. The closeout is short and under control — no contest at the catch.
copy.explanation_md: **Advantage or Reset — other side.** A short closeout works the same on the left wing as the right. Your defender was helping when the pass left — he's running while you're catching. If the closeout is short and under control, catch and shoot. If he flies past, drive. If he's set, reset. Read his cushion, not your spot.

feedback.correct: Good read. Same short closeout, left side. You caught and shot before he could contest.
feedback.partial: A drive can work against a flying closeout. This one was short and under control — the shot was open.
feedback.wrong: Look at the closeout. Short and under control means the shot is open. Catch and shoot.

self_review_checklist: Did I see the defender helping before the pass arrived?
Did I catch in my shooting pocket?
Did I read the cushion before I dribbled?
Did I shoot before his hands were up?
acceptable_reads: Rip and drive baseline if the defender is sprinting past — produces a layup or kickout, but loses the clean catch-and-shoot.
bad_reads: Pass back to the point — gives up the open look and resets the defense.
Hold and pump fake — the defender closes the cushion and contests.

shoot.label: Shoot it.
shoot.feedback_text: Best read. The defender was helping and is still a step short. Take the shot off the catch.

rip_and_drive.label: Rip and drive past him.
rip_and_drive.feedback_text: Okay. Driving works against a flying closeout, but this defender is under control. The shot was the cleaner read.
rip_and_drive.partial_feedback_text: A drive can work, but you gave up the open jumper. Short closeout — shoot.

pass_back.label: Pass it back to the point.
pass_back.feedback_text: Not yet. You had an open shot. Passing it back lets the defense set up.

pump_fake_hold.label: Hold the ball and pump fake.
pump_fake_hold.feedback_text: Not yet. The defender catches up while you hesitate. The shot was open at the catch.
